# portfolio — ARCHITECTURE.md
# Last Updated: 2026-06-02
# Status: CURRENT SOURCE OF TRUTH — generated by ARCHITECT 2026-06-02

## Feature Overview

The `portfolio` feature is an engine-wrapper module that bridges VCSM's actor-based
identity system to the shared `@portfolio` engine. The feature itself contains a single
file (`setup.js`) which configures the engine at app startup with VCSM-specific ownership
verification (`isActorOwner` DI binding via `vc.actor_owners`) and a dev-only trace store.
All portfolio business logic, data access, domain models, and UI components are owned and
executed by the shared `engines/portfolio/` engine. Dashboard-specific UI, controllers,
hooks, and DAL extensions for this feature live inside the dashboard card at
`apps/VCSM/src/features/dashboard/vport/dashboard/cards/portfolio/`.

**Source Path:** apps/VCSM/src/features/portfolio/
**Engine Path:** engines/portfolio/ (alias: @portfolio)
**Dashboard UI Path:** apps/VCSM/src/features/dashboard/vport/dashboard/cards/portfolio/
**Profiles Hook Path:** apps/VCSM/src/features/profiles/kinds/vport/hooks/portfolio/
**Profiles Controller Path:** apps/VCSM/src/features/profiles/kinds/vport/controller/portfolio/

---

## Layer Presence

| Layer | Present | Path |
|---|---|---|
| Controllers | YES (engine + dashboard card) | engines/portfolio/src/controller/ + features/dashboard/vport/dashboard/cards/portfolio/controller/ |
| DALs | YES (engine + dashboard card) | engines/portfolio/src/dal/ + features/dashboard/vport/dashboard/cards/portfolio/dal/ |
| Models | YES (engine) | engines/portfolio/src/model/ |
| Hooks | YES (dashboard card + profiles) | features/dashboard/vport/dashboard/cards/portfolio/hooks/ + features/profiles/kinds/vport/hooks/portfolio/ |
| Screens | YES (dashboard card) | features/dashboard/vport/dashboard/cards/portfolio/VportDashboardPortfolioScreen.jsx |
| Components | YES (dashboard card) | features/dashboard/vport/dashboard/cards/portfolio/components/ |
| Adapters | YES | features/profiles/adapters/kinds/vport/vportProfiles.adapter.js (re-exports hooks) |
| Engine controllers | YES | engines/portfolio/src/controller/ (8 controllers) |
| Engine DALs | YES | engines/portfolio/src/dal/ (8 DAL files) |

---

## Active Controllers

### Engine Controllers (engines/portfolio/src/controller/)

| Controller | Purpose | Auth Gate |
|---|---|---|
| createItem.controller.js | Create new portfolio item with optional tags | isActorOwner(actorId) via DI + actorId required |
| updateItem.controller.js | Update existing portfolio item fields and tags | isActorOwner(actorId) + profile_id cross-check (PORT-V-002) |
| deleteItem.controller.js | Soft-delete portfolio item | isActorOwner(actorId) + profile_id cross-check |
| addMedia.controller.js | Add media file to portfolio item | isActorOwner(actorId) + profile_id cross-check (PORT-V-003) |
| removeMedia.controller.js | Remove media from portfolio item | isActorOwner(actorId) |
| manageTags.controller.js | Replace all tags for a portfolio item | isActorOwner(actorId) + profile_id cross-check (PORT-V-002) |
| listPortfolio.controller.js | Public read — list all items for an actor (enriched with media + tags) | None — public read |
| getPortfolioItem.controller.js | Fetch single portfolio item with details | None — public read |

### Dashboard Card Controllers (apps/VCSM/src/features/dashboard/vport/dashboard/cards/portfolio/controller/)

| Controller | Purpose | Auth Gate |
|---|---|---|
| addPortfolioMediaWithRecord.controller.js | Composite: addMedia (engine) + record to platform.media_assets (non-blocking) | Delegates to addMedia (isActorOwner) + createMediaAssetController |
| probeVportPortfolio.controller.js | Dev diagnostic: resolves profile, access rows, actor owners for a given actorId | Dev/diagnostic only — no mutation |

### Profiles Controller (apps/VCSM/src/features/profiles/kinds/vport/controller/portfolio/)

| Controller | Purpose | Auth Gate |
|---|---|---|
| VportPortfolio.controller.js | CTL wrapper around engine listPortfolio + getPortfolioItem; adds 60s TTL cache | Delegates to engine (no additional gate) |

---

## Active Hooks

| Hook | What It Calls | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| useVportPortfolio (profiles/kinds/vport/hooks/portfolio/) | ctrlListPortfolio, ctrlGetPortfolioItem, invalidatePortfolioCache from VportPortfolio.controller.js | Full portfolio state management: paginated load, optimistic add/remove/update, tag filtering, item detail |
| useVportPortfolioProbe (dashboard card hooks/) | probeVportPortfolioController, portfolioTraceStore | Dev-only diagnostic probe — renders identity/profile/ownership debug info |
| usePortfolioItemSubmit (dashboard card components/portfolio/hooks/) | createItem, updateItem (engine), addPortfolioMediaWithRecord, ctrlSavePortfolioDetail, publishLocksmithPortfolioUpdateAsPostController | Form submission for create/edit — orchestrates item creation, media upload, locksmith details, and optional feed publish |
| usePortfolioMediaUpload (dashboard card components/portfolio/hooks/) | useMediaUpload (@media engine) | Wraps media engine upload with portfolio_media scope |

## Cross-Feature Dependencies

| Feature | What Is Imported | Direction |

| media (feature adapter) | createMediaAssetController, resolveVcsmAppId from @/features/media/adapters/media.adapter and mediaAppId.adapter | addPortfolioMediaWithRecord.controller.js consumes media feature adapter |
| dashboard/vport (dal, hooks, screens) | readVportProfileByActorIdDAL, readVportProfileActorAccessDAL, readActorOwnersByActorIdDAL, useVportOwnership | probeVportPortfolio.controller.js and VportDashboardPortfolioScreen consume dashboard vport internals |
| profiles/kinds/vport (controller/locksmith) | ctrlSavePortfolioDetail, publishLocksmithPortfolioUpdateAsPostController | usePortfolioItemSubmit calls locksmith controllers after portfolio item save |
| profiles/adapters/kinds/vport | useVportPortfolio, usePublishBarbershopPortfolioPost | VportDashboardPortfolioScreen consumes these via profiles adapter boundary |
| identity (state) | useIdentity | Screen uses identity for actor context and vport type detection |
| auth (provider) | useAuth | useVportPortfolioProbe consumes auth for userId/email |

---

## Authorization Pattern

**Engine write controllers** use a two-part ownership check:

1. Profile cross-check: fetches `vport.profiles.id` for the caller's actorId and compares
   against the item's `profile_id`. Items do not have a direct `actor_id` column — ownership
   is via `profile_id` linkage (PORT-V-002 pattern).
2. `isActorOwner(actorId)`: calls the DI-injected resolver which queries `vc.actor_owners`
   filtered by `actor_id` + `is_void = false`. RLS auto-scopes this to `user_id = auth.uid()`.

Read controllers (listPortfolio, getPortfolioItem) have no auth gate — public read.

The ownership DI binding is configured in `apps/VCSM/src/features/portfolio/setup.js`
via `configurePortfolioEngine({ isActorOwner })`. This single file is the sole control
point for ownership enforcement across the entire engine.

**Dashboard card DAL** (`updatePortfolioMediaAssetIdDAL`) implements a defense-in-depth
ownership scope: it requires `callerProfileId` and adds `.eq('profile_id', callerProfileId)`
to the UPDATE query, preventing cross-profile writes at the app layer alongside RLS (PORT-V-005).

---

## Module Independence Classification

**DEPENDENT**

The feature root (`apps/VCSM/src/features/portfolio/`) is a thin engine configuration
wrapper — all logic, data access, models, and UI are owned by `engines/portfolio/`. The
dashboard card and profiles hooks are nested inside other features, not inside this feature
folder. Portfolio cannot function without the `@portfolio` engine being configured via
`setupVcsmPortfolioEngine()` at app startup.

---

## Architecture State

**EVOLVING**

The engine layer is well-structured and complete with a full controller/DAL/model/events/
DI stack. The VCSM feature integration is functional but structurally fragmented: UI,
hooks, and supplementary controllers are distributed across dashboard/vport and profiles
features rather than co-located. Two known security defects are tracked (ELEK-2026-05-28-040,
ELEK-2026-05-28-041). Governance documentation is near-zero (DR_STRANGE readiness ~8%).

---

## Known Structural Risks

1. **Fragmented module layout** — portfolio-related controllers, hooks, components, and screens
   are distributed across three separate feature paths (features/portfolio/, features/dashboard/
   vport/dashboard/cards/portfolio/, features/profiles/kinds/vport/) with no clear adapter
   boundary separating them.

2. **ELEK-2026-05-28-040** — `ctrlSavePortfolioDetail` (locksmith controller, called from
   usePortfolioItemSubmit) is missing `assertActorOwnsVportActorController` ownership gate.
   Any authenticated user knowing actorId + portfolioItemId can corrupt locksmith portfolio
   details. Status: OPEN HIGH.

3. **ELEK-2026-05-28-041** — `updatePortfolioMediaAssetIdDAL` silently drops ownership filter
   if `callerProfileId` is null/undefined, falling back to an un-scoped UPDATE. The controller
   now throws on null callerProfileId but the original concern was silent degradation.
   Status: OPEN LOW.

4. **Single point of failure — setup.js** — the `isActorOwner` DI binding in setup.js is the
   sole mechanism controlling ownership enforcement for the entire engine. If `setupVcsmPortfolioEngine()`
   is not called before render (or called with incorrect config), all write operations will
   throw uncaught config errors rather than fail gracefully.

5. **Dashboard card consumes dashboard vport internals directly** — `probeVportPortfolio.controller.js`
   imports from `@/features/dashboard/vport/dal/read/` without going through an adapter
   boundary. This is a direct internal-to-internal import across features.

6. **Zero governance documentation** — SECURITY.md, OWNERSHIP.md, CURRENT_STATUS.md,
   TESTS.md, BLOCKERS.md, DEFERRED.md, HISTORY_INDEX.md all missing. DR_STRANGE readiness: ~8%.

---

---

## Recommended Handoffs

- **VENOM** — Security audit on the portfolio engine boundary and write surfaces. ELEK-040
  must be resolved before THOR eligibility. setup.js single-point-of-failure risk.
- **IRONMAN** — Confirm ownership of the distributed portfolio modules. Clarify whether
  dashboard card portfolio should be co-located under features/portfolio/ or remain in
  dashboard.
- **SPIDER-MAN** — No tests exist for portfolio feature, dashboard card controllers, or
  the usePortfolioItemSubmit hook. Regression coverage needed before THOR.
- **SENTRY** — Runtime monitoring / error boundary coverage for portfolio write path.

---

## Final Module Status

**MOSTLY COMPLETE**

The portfolio feature is functionally complete (all CRUD operations implemented, media
upload integrated, barber/locksmith details supported, feed publishing wired). The
architecture is structurally fragmented and security governance is incomplete (ELEK-040
open, zero governance docs). Cannot be COMPLETE until ELEK-040 is resolved, VENOM runs
and closes, and governance documentation is bootstrapped.
